# Antigravity parity golden fixture

Snapshot of the **expected Compiled Skill** output for `dag init --orchestrator=antigravity` **before** Source Skill placeholders (Fase 2 baseline).

Captured: 2026-06-20 from repo root `SKILL.md`, `references/*.md`, and whitelisted `scripts/` per [ADR-0015](../../../adr/0015-compiled-skill-scripts-whitelist.md).

**Excluded from diff:** `dag-config.json` (new artifact).

**Regenerate:** only if pre-placeholder SKILL/references intentionally change before golden gate passes.
